mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS a_id, a.title AS a_title, a.cover AS a_cover, a.author AS a_author, a.content AS a_content, a.state AS a_state, a.top AS a_top, a.download_enable AS a_download_enable, a.download_name AS a_download_name, a.download_url AS a_download_url, a.download_size AS a_download_size, a.download_desc AS a_download_desc, a.view_count AS a_view_count, a.like_count AS a_like_count, a.create_time AS a_created_time, a.update_time AS a_updated_time, c.id AS cate_id, c.name AS cate_name, t.id AS tag_id, t.name AS tag_name FROM rgh_article a LEFT JOIN rgh_article_category ac ON a.id = ac.article_id LEFT JOIN rgh_category c ON ac.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN rgh_article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id LEFT JOIN rgh_tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT ac.article_id AS articleId, ac.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName FROM rgh_article_category ac LEFT JOIN rgh_category c ON ac.category_id = c.id WHERE ac.article_id IN
#{id}

SELECT at2.article_id AS articleId, at2.tag_id AS tagId, t.name AS tagName FROM rgh_article_tag at2 LEFT JOIN rgh_tag t ON at2.tag_id = t.id WHERE at2.article_id IN
#{id}

SELECT a.id AS a_id, a.title AS a_title, a.cover AS a_cover, a.author AS a_author, a.content AS a_content, a.state AS a_state, a.top AS a_top, a.view_count AS a_view_count, a.like_count AS a_like_count, a.create_time AS a_created_time, a.update_time AS a_updated_time, c.id AS cate_id, c.name AS cate_name, t.id AS tag_id, t.name AS tag_name FROM rgh_article a INNER JOIN rgh_article_category ac ON a.id = ac.article_id AND ac.category_id = #{categoryId} LEFT JOIN rgh_category c ON ac.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN rgh_article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id LEFT JOIN rgh_tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.state = 1 ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id AS a_id, a.title AS a_title, a.cover AS a_cover, a.author AS a_author, a.content AS a_content, a.state AS a_state, a.top AS a_top, a.view_count AS a_view_count, a.like_count AS a_like_count, a.create_time AS a_created_time, a.update_time AS a_updated_time, c.id AS cate_id, c.name AS cate_name, t.id AS tag_id, t.name AS tag_name FROM rgh_article a INNER JOIN rgh_article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id AND at.tag_id = #{tagId} LEFT JOIN rgh_article_category ac ON a.id = ac.article_id LEFT JOIN rgh_category c ON ac.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN rgh_tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.state = 1 ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.create_time DESC
